word: H7600 - שַׁאֲנָן - shaʼănân - shah-an-awn' - That is at ease

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁאנן

Transliteration: sha'ănân

Phonetic: shah-an-awn'

BDB Definition:

  1. at ease, quiet, secure (adjective)
    1. at ease, secure
    2. at ease, careless, wanton, arrogant
  2. security, pride, arrogance (substantive)
    1. one at ease
    2. arrogance

Origin: from H7599

TWOT entry: 2304a

Part(s) of speech:
